notes: Powerline Ethernet adapter (HomePlug AV2, AV1000 class) that carries network traffic over existing electrical wiring. Wall-plug form factor; plugs directly into a standard outlet — no rack mounting, so rackUnits omitted. Has no passthrough outlet (the passthrough variant is the TL-PA7017P, a different SKU). Product is actively listed for sale on the TP-Link US site as of the source fetch; no end-of-life or discontinuation indication. The NEMA 5-15 connector for the power input is inferred from the 'Plug Type: US' specification — the source page does not use the term 'NEMA 5-15' explicitly.

ports.name: Ethernet
ports.note: Single Gigabit Ethernet port for connecting a wired device to the powerline network

ports.name: Power / Wall Plug
ports.note: Built-in US wall-plug prongs; source page states 'Plug Type: US' without specifying NEMA 5-15 by name — designation inferred from standard US plug form factor
